videos.headline: Bryce Lance hauls in sensational one-handed TD grab for NDSU
videos.description: Trey Lance's brother Bryce makes a ridiculous touchdown catch for his third score of the game for North Dakota State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bryce Lance hauls in sensational one-handed TD grab for NDSU) 2024/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Miller lets it fly to Bryce Lance for a NDSU TD
videos.description: Cam Miller connects with Bryce Lance for 21 yards to give North Dakota State an early lead over South Dakota State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Miller lets it fly to Bryce Lance for a NDSU TD) 2024/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Mark Gronowski muscles in for a SDSU TD
videos.description: Mark Gronowski gets SDSU on the board with a powerful 1-yard rushing touchdown vs. NDSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mark Gronowski muscles in for a SDSU TD) 2024/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Amar Johnson races into the end zone for South Dakota State
videos.description: Amar Johnson gives South Dakota State its first lead of the game with an impressive 39-yard rushing touchdown vs. North Dakota State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Amar Johnson races into the end zone for South Dakota State) 2024/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Loshiaka Roques recovers fumble for North Dakota State
videos.description: SDSU fumbles the ball and Loshiaka Roques recovers the ball for NDSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Loshiaka Roques recovers fumble for North Dakota State) 2024/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Miller punches it in for North Dakota State
videos.description: Cam Miller rushes two yards into the end zone for a North Dakota State touchdown in the second quarter vs. South Dakota State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Miller punches it in for North Dakota State) 2024/12/20 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Cam Miller breaks off 12-yard rush) 2024/12/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Miller finds Bryce Lance for a 47-yard receiving TD
videos.description: Cam Miller fires the ball 47 yards to Bryce Lance in the end zone to give the Bison a lead over the Jackrabbits.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One_Play (Cam Miller finds Bryce Lance for a 47-yard receiving TD) 2024/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Grahm Goering hauls in a TD for Jackrabbits
videos.description: Mark Gronowski connects with Grahm Goering for a 14-yard South Dakota State receiving touchdown vs. North Dakota State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Grahm Goering hauls in a TD for Jackrabbits) 2024/12/20 ESHEET
